name: @by-lua/lspec-subagents
description_en: L-Spec Subagents — 9 specialized agents for PI.dev with centralized model config (inspired by oh-my-opencode-slim). Forked from @tintinweb/pi-subagents.
description_zh: L-Spec 子代理 — PI.dev 的 9 个专业代理，具有集中式模型配置（受 oh-my-opencode-slim 启发）。从 @tintinweb/pi-subagents 分叉。
